data.title: Velo3D Secures Funding and Appoints New Leadership
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Velo3D ( (VLDX) ) has provided an announcement.

Velo3D, Inc. has issued a Senior Secured Convertible Promissory Note worth $5,000,000 to Thieneman Properties, LLC, secured by the company’s accounts receivable and inventory. The Note, due on April 7, 2025, can be converted into common stock upon default, and Velo3D has agreed to a registration rights agreement for any issued stock. Additionally, Arun Jeldi has been appointed as CEO with a base salary of $425,000, and Bradley Kreger’s salary as COO has been approved at $400,000.

More about Velo3D

data.title: Ur-Energy’s CEO to Speak at 2025 Mining Conference
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

The latest update is out from UR-Energy ( (TSE:URE) ).

Ur-Energy announced that its Chairman and CEO, John Cash, will participate in the upcoming Maxim Group LLC 2025 Mining Conference, focusing on critical minerals and precious metals. This participation highlights Ur-Energy’s active engagement in industry discussions, potentially impacting its market presence and stakeholder relations.

More about UR-Energy

Ur-Energy is a uranium mining company that operates the Lost Creek in situ recovery uranium facility in Wyoming. The company focuses on uranium mining, recovery, and processing activities, with operations in the United States. It is advancing construction at its second facility, Shirley Basin, and awaits regulatory authorization for Lost Creek expansion. Ur-Energy’s shares are traded on NYSE American and the Toronto Stock Exchange.

data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

American Airlines ( (AAL) ) has provided an announcement.

Priya R. Aiyar, Executive Vice President and Chief Legal Officer of American Airlines, is resigning effective February 21, 2025, to pursue a similar role outside the airline industry. The company has appointed Bruce Wark as Interim Chief Legal Officer during the search for her replacement, highlighting the importance of this leadership role for the airline’s legal team.

More about American Airlines

American Airlines Group Inc. operates in the airline industry, providing passenger and cargo air transportation services. It is one of the largest airlines globally, focusing on a comprehensive network of domestic and international destinations.

APA ( (APA) ) has shared an announcement.

APA Corporation’s Board of Directors has approved updated agreements for performance shares and stock options under its 2016 Omnibus Compensation Plan. These changes aim to refine executive compensation, with vesting of performance shares now linked to Relative Total Shareholder Return and Cash Return on Invested Capital, enhancing alignment with shareholder interests.

data.title: Expansion of Altius’s Royalty Rights in Silicon Gold District Announced
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Altius Minerals ( (TSE:ALS) ) has issued an announcement.

Altius Minerals Corporation announced a partial award decision from an arbitration Tribunal regarding its royalty interests in the Silicon gold district in Nevada. The Tribunal confirmed that Altius’s royalty covers the entire Base Area of Interest and some adjacent lands, expanding its rights significantly. However, lands acquired by AngloGold Ashanti from third parties before the Royalty Agreement are excluded. This decision potentially strengthens Altius’s position in the district, pending a final award.

More about Altius Minerals

Altius Minerals Corporation operates in the mining industry, focusing on royalty and mineral property interests. Its primary products include royalties on mineral lands, particularly in the gold sector, with a significant market focus on emerging mineral districts.

data.title: Home Federal Bancorp Announces Transition Agreement with Executive
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

An update from Home Federal Bancorp Of Louisiana ( (HFBL) ) is now available.

Home Federal Bancorp of Louisiana announced an Amended and Restated Transition Agreement with its Senior Vice President and Senior Credit Officer, Adalberto Cantu, Jr. Under the agreement, Mr. Cantu will transition to a part-time role as Special Assets Manager in 2026, with a reduced salary and continued benefits, including insurance coverage and a mobile phone allowance. Upon fulfilling the agreement terms and retiring in November 2026, Mr. Cantu is eligible for a $10,000 severance payment.

Barratt Developments ( (GB:BTRW) ) has shared an announcement.

Barratt Redrow PLC has announced a significant change in its voting rights, with Bridgemere Investments Limited and Bridgemere Securities Limited acquiring a 4.9852% stake. data.title: American Electric Power’s Strategic Partnership with KKR and PSP
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

American Electric Power ( (AEP) ) just unveiled an announcement.

American Electric Power announced a strategic partnership with KKR and PSP Investments to sell a 19.9% equity interest in its Ohio and Indiana & Michigan Transmission Companies for $2.82 billion. This transaction provides AEP with efficient financing to support its five-year, $54 billion capital investment plan, enhancing reliability and service for customers. The deal, which allows AEP to maintain control of its transmission assets, is expected to close in the second half of 2025, pending regulatory approvals, and will be immediately accretive to the company’s earnings and credit profile.

More about American Electric Power

American Electric Power (AEP) is a major electricity provider and one of the largest electricity producers in the United States, with a diverse generating capacity of 29,000 megawatts. The company operates the nation’s largest electric transmission system spanning 40,000 line miles and more than 225,000 miles of distribution lines, delivering energy to 5.6 million customers across 11 states. AEP focuses on safety, operational excellence, and economic development, investing $54 billion from 2025 through 2029 to enhance its transmission, distribution, and generation projects.

YTD Price Performance: 0.35%

Average Trading Volume: 2,755,305

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $49.13B
